lead: Hi, I'm Logan. I'm a college student, occasional writer, and full-time tinkerer. This site is where I keep the things I'd rather not lose to the bottom of my notes app.

sections.heading: What I'm doing right now
sections.body: Studying, writing, and trying to figure out which of the many shiny things in front of me are worth chasing. I post about classes I'm taking, things I'm reading, and projects I can't stop thinking about.

sections.heading: What I care about
sections.body: Clear writing. Honest argument. Ideas that survive contact with reality. I have a slight allergy to jargon and a soft spot for marginalia. I'd rather be wrong in interesting ways than right in boring ones.

sections.heading: What I'm working on
sections.body: A handful of things, never all at once. Right now: this site, a long essay about something I shouldn't talk about until it's done, and the slow accumulation of class notes I plan to publish at the end of each semester.

quote.text: Writing is thinking. To write well is to think clearly. That's why it's so hard.
quote.author: David McCullough

practical: I read everything I'm sent at hello@loganbrandall.com.
I post when I have something worth posting - never on a schedule.
If you're a fellow student and want to swap notes on a class, please write.
